name: SEW-Eurodrive K37 Helical-Bevel Gearbox
description: The SEW-Eurodrive K37 helical-bevel gearbox combines high efficiency with compact dimensions for right-angle drive applications. With a 37 frame size and 0.55 kW motor rating, it provides reliable power transmission for conveyors and mixers.
shortDescription: Helical-bevel gearbox, K37, 0.55 kW, 33:1 ratio, right-angle output.
technicalDescription: Right-angle helical-bevel gear unit with K37 frame size, hollow shaft output, and integrally mounted DRS71S4 AC motor. Ratio 33:1, output torque 175 Nm. Synthetic oil fill for maintenance-free operation.
features: Helical-bevel design for right-angle power transmission
Hollow shaft output for direct machine mounting
Integral AC motor for compact installation
benefits: Reduces installation space with right-angle design
Eliminates coupling alignment with hollow shaft
Lower operating costs with high efficiency
seoDescription: SEW K37 helical-bevel gearbox, 0.55 kW, 33:1 ratio, 175 Nm, hollow shaft. For conveyor, mixer, and packaging drives.

faq.question: What lubrication is required?
faq.answer: Factory-filled with synthetic oil (ISO VG 220) for maintenance-free operation. No initial oil change needed.

faq.question: Can this be mounted in any orientation?
faq.answer: Yes, but the breather and drain plug positions must be configured for the mounting orientation.

faq.question: What is the service factor?
faq.answer: The service factor at the rated torque is 1.4 for uniform loading.

name: Siemens Flender H2SH 09 Helical Gear Unit
description: The Siemens Flender H2SH 09 is a heavy-duty parallel shaft helical gear unit for industrial power transmission. Designed for continuous operation in demanding applications, it delivers 50 kW capacity with high shock load resistance.
shortDescription: Parallel shaft helical gear unit, H2SH 09, 50 kW, foot-mounted.
technicalDescription: Two-stage helical gear reducer with case-hardened and ground gears. Foot-mounted with solid output shaft. Suitable for 24/7 operation in harsh environments. Cast iron housing with high cooling capacity.
features: High overload capacity for shock loads
Cast iron housing with excellent damping
benefits: Reliable operation in continuous heavy-duty service
Compact design with high power density
Long service life with robust gear design

images.alt: Siemens Flender H2SH Helical Gear Unit

seoTitle: Siemens Flender H2SH 09 Helical Gear Unit
seoDescription: Siemens Flender H2SH 09 helical gear unit, 50 kW, parallel shaft, case-hardened gears. For conveyors, crushers, and heavy industrial drives.

faq.question: What lubrication is required?
faq.answer: ISO VG 320 mineral oil for standard applications. Synthetic oil recommended for extreme temperatures.

faq.question: What is the maximum ambient temperature?
faq.answer: Standard design allows -20°C to +40°C ambient. Extended temperature range available with synthetic oil.

faq.question: What options are available for shaft mounting?
faq.answer: Solid shaft (standard), hollow shaft with shrink disc, or splined hollow shaft.

name: Siemens Spur Gear Module 5, 30 Teeth, 20mm Bore
description: Precision-ground spur gear with module 5, 30 teeth, and 20mm bore. Manufactured from case-hardened steel for high wear resistance in industrial power transmission applications.
shortDescription: Spur gear, module 5, 30 teeth, 20mm bore, case-hardened steel.
technicalDescription: Involute spur gear with 20° pressure angle, module 5, 30 teeth. ISO 8 quality (AGMA 9). 20mm finished bore with keyway per DIN 6885. Case-hardened to 58-62 HRC.
features: Precision ground teeth for quiet running
benefits: Long wear life with hardened teeth
Smooth, quiet operation at high speeds
seoTitle: Siemens Spur Gear Module 5 | 30 Teeth | 20mm Bore
seoDescription: Precision spur gear, module 5, 30 teeth, 20mm bore, case-hardened 58-62 HRC. For machine tool and industrial transmission applications.

faq.question: What backlash is provided?
faq.answer: Standard backlash per DIN 3967 is 0.10-0.16 mm for this gear size.

faq.question: Can the bore be modified?
faq.answer: The gear is supplied with finished bore and keyway. Re-boring is possible but may reduce case depth.

faq.question: What mating gear is recommended?
faq.answer: A module 5 gear with any tooth count can mate. For a 1:1 ratio, another SA-M5-30T gear is needed.

name: SEW-Eurodrive S40 Worm Gearbox
description: The SEW S40 worm gearbox provides smooth, quiet, and compact right-angle power transmission. With a 40 frame and 0.75 kW motor, it is ideal for applications requiring low noise and high reduction ratios.
shortDescription: Worm gearbox, S40, 0.75 kW, 40:1 ratio, right-angle, compact.
technicalDescription: Single-stage worm gear reducer with S40 frame, hollow shaft and torque arm. Ratio 40:1, output torque 120 Nm. Aluminum housing for heat dissipation. Oil-bath lubrication with synthetic oil.
features: Single-stage worm gear for compact size
Aluminum housing for efficient heat dissipation
Hollow shaft with torque arm mounting
benefits: Compact design fits in tight spaces
seoTitle: SEW S40 Worm Gearbox | 0.75 kW, 40:1 Ratio
seoDescription: SEW S40 worm gearbox, 0.75 kW, 40:1 ratio, 120 Nm, aluminum housing. For packaging, food processing, and conveyor applications.

faq.question: What is the efficiency?
faq.answer: Worm gear efficiency is typically 75-85% depending on ratio and speed. For high efficiency, use the helical-bevel K series.

faq.question: Is synthetic oil pre-filled?
faq.answer: Yes, factory-filled with synthetic worm gear oil for life. No initial oil change required.

faq.question: What mounting options are available?
faq.answer: Standard is hollow shaft with torque arm. Flange and foot mounting options are also available.

name: Flender B2SV 05 Bevel-Helical Gear Unit
description: The Flender B2SV 05 is a bevel-helical gear unit designed for heavy-duty bulk material handling applications. With 30 kW capacity and right-angle input, it provides reliable drive for stackers, reclaimers, and belt conveyors.
shortDescription: Bevel-helical gear unit, B2SV 05, 30 kW, right-angle input, heavy-duty.
technicalDescription: Two-stage bevel-helical gear reducer with spiral bevel gears and helical output stage. Case-hardened and ground gears. Cast iron housing with integrated cooling fan. Shaft-mounted with torque arm.
features: Spiral bevel gears for smooth operation
Integrated cooling fan for continuous duty
benefits: Reduces installation cost with shaft-mount design
seoDescription: Flender B2SV 05 bevel-helical gear unit, 30 kW, right-angle input, shaft-mounted. For belt conveyors, bucket elevators, and bulk material handling.

faq.question: What is the lubrication method?
faq.answer: Splash lubrication with oil bath. Oil change interval is 3,000 hours with mineral oil, 6,000 hours with synthetic.

faq.question: Can a backstop be installed?
faq.answer: Yes, an optional backstop can be integrated for incline conveyor applications to prevent reverse rotation.

faq.question: What is the temperature rise?
faq.answer: Temperature rise at rated load is approximately 40°C above ambient with integrated cooling fan.

name: SEW-Eurodrive P60 Parallel Shaft Gearbox
description: The SEW P60 parallel shaft helical gearbox delivers high torque for heavy industrial applications. This 60 frame unit with 5.5 kW motor provides reliable drive for large conveyors, mixers, and crushers.
shortDescription: Parallel shaft helical gearbox, P60, 5.5 kW, foot-mounted, high torque.
technicalDescription: Two-stage helical gear unit with parallel shafts, foot-mounted with solid output shaft. DRN132S4 IE3 motor. Ratio 20:1, output torque 700 Nm. Cast iron housing with heavy-duty bearing supports.
features: Two-stage helical gears for high efficiency
Cast iron housing for vibration damping
benefits: High torque capacity in compact package
Energy-efficient IE3 motor reduces operating cost
seoTitle: SEW P60 Parallel Shaft Helical Gearbox
seoDescription: SEW P60 parallel shaft gearbox, 5.5 kW, 20:1 ratio, 700 Nm, IE3 motor. For conveyors, mixers, and heavy industrial drives.

faq.question: What is the efficiency?
faq.answer: Helical gear efficiency is typically 95-97% per stage, giving total efficiency of 92-94% for a two-stage unit.

faq.question: What is the maximum overhung load?
faq.answer: Maximum overhung load on the output shaft is 8,000 N at mid-span.

faq.question: What motor options are available?
faq.answer: Standard is IE3 efficiency. NEMA, IEC, and explosion-proof motor options are available.
